prompt:
Modern minimalist 1:1 hyper-realistic OUTDOOR lifestyle photograph. NO PEOPLE, NO hands. Subtle product-color theming (teal/cyan + gold + sage-green + warm wood echoing the jar's brand palette).

SCENE: a clean modern outdoor wood patio table mid-afternoon — warm-walnut wood surface, surrounded by lush sage-green foliage in the soft-focus background (sage greens echo the brand teal). The Dialed Sea Moss Gummies jar (matching the provided reference image — black plastic, teal/cyan + gold/yellow accents, GOLD LID, front label fully legible) sits OFF-CENTER on the wood table in the right third of the frame. The jar sits alone in the scene with NO additional props — no cups, no glasses, no plants beside it, no objects nearby. Just the jar.

ANGLE: a SLIGHTLY ELEVATED 3/4 ANGLE — the camera is just above seated eye-level looking down at the table at a comfortable 30° angle.

LIGHTING: bright clean direct natural sunlight filtering softly from upper-left through tree leaves (gentle dappled but not heavily fragmented). The jar catches a clean warm specular highlight on its curved glossy black plastic, warm gleam on the gold lid. Soft warm natural shadows on the wood table.

FRAMING: balanced minimalist outdoor arrangement with intentional negative space.

BACKGROUND: out-of-focus modern outdoor garden / patio — lush sage-green foliage, warm sunlight through leaves, atmospheric depth. Shallow depth-of-field, bright airy real-photograph feel.

STYLE: hyper-realistic outdoor photography, 50mm look, f/2.8 shallow depth, simple modern clean composition with subtle brand-color cues. NO AI artifacts, NO text overlays, NO graphic elements, NO callouts.
